source_jobs.title: CTO & Co-Founder - Agentic AI (LegalTech)
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT ANTAI VENTURES

Antai Ventures https://antaiventures.com/ is a leading venture studio headquartered in Barcelona, with a strong presence across Southern Europe and Latin America. We team up with exceptional entrepreneurs to build disruptive, scalable companies from scratch. Since 2012, we've co-founded 30+ ventures, including Glovo, Wallapop, PlatanoMelon, and PiperAI. Collectively, our startups have raised over $1.5B in funding, generated $3B+ in shareholder value, and created 5,000+ jobs.




💡ABOUT JURYO https://juryo.ai/



Juryo is building the agentic AI platform for small and mid-sized law firms, starting with high-volume B2C practices (extranjería, LSO, laboral, deudas, civil). Our voice and WhatsApp agents already qualify clients, generate documents, manage cases, and handle billing workflows, delivering over 2× improvement in lead conversion for our customers.


We’ve gone from idea to revenue in months:

 - Multiple paying law firms onboarded

 - Six-digit ARR

 - Daily usage (+200 calls/WhatsApps) by real customers

 - Clear PMF in a massive, fragmented €5B+ market (in Spain alone)
   
   

As a co‑founder, you’ll be in the driver's seat—shaping the vision, setting the pace, and taking ownership. In return, we’ll back you with capital and provide hands‑on support across Product, Tech, Design, GTM, Legal, Talent, Finance, and Fundraising to accelerate your journey from 0 to 1.




🛠️ WHAT YOU’LL DO



 - Co‑craft the technical North Star with the founding team and convert vision into an aggressive, value‑obsessed roadmap.

 - Build hands‑on and ship code daily, leveraging the latest AI orchestration techniques (multi‑agent workflows, toolformer, dynamic RAG pipelines) and rock‑solid engineering practices (DDD, SOLID, ruthless automation) to deliver customer value at record speed.

 - Recruit, coach, and scale a top‑1 % engineering guild spanning backend, frontend, data, and DevOps—shipping product that customers actually use every single week.

 - Design high‑throughput data pipelines to improve our agents while guaranteeing security and compliance.

 - Drive a culture of excellence through continuous delivery, rapid experimentation, and metrics‑driven improvement.

 - Move fast, obsess over customer impact, and work tirelessly to turn an ambitious vision in reality.
   
   


🔍 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



 - 5+ years of experience as a Software Engineer

 - Hands‑on builder. You prototype quickly and turn ideas into working features in days.

 - Practical AI experience. You’ve built with modern LLM tools—agent orchestration, RAG, embeddings—and know what works in production.

 - Curious and smart. You track new research and apply what’s useful.

 - User‑value focus. You measure success by customer impact and time saved, not vanity metrics.

 - Ownership mindset. You take responsibility for outcomes and think long‑term about product and company value.

 - Bias for shipping. You pick simple solutions, automate routine tasks, and release early and often.

 - Team builder. You attract and develop strong engineers and foster a supportive, high‑standards culture.

 - Clear communicator. You explain technical trade‑offs to both engineers and non‑technical stakeholders.
   
   


🤝 WHAT WE OFFER



 - Day‑1 founding seat. Jump into an ambitious startup from the ground up, with a validated concept and live pilots.

 - De‑risked upside. Build as a co‑founder on a path charted by Antai’s successful venture‑studio model—capital, playbooks, and network included.

 - Full‑stack operator support. Access Antai’s expert teams in Product, Engineering, Design, GTM, Legal, Talent, and Fundraising whenever you need them.

 - Significant equity. Own a sizable stake in this venture and optional carry in other Antai portfolio startups.

 - Founder community & investors. Join a tight network of serial entrepreneurs and top‑tier backers who’ve scaled category leaders.

 - Workspace flexibility. Work from our hubs in Barcelona, Madrid,

source_jobs.title: Co-Founder & CEO - eCommerce Holding Company
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT ANTAI VENTURES

Antai Ventures is a leading venture studio headquartered in Barcelona, with a strong presence across Southern Europe and Latin America. We team up with exceptional entrepreneurs to build disruptive, scalable companies from scratch. Since 2012, we've co-founded 30+ ventures, including Glovo, Wallapop, PlatanoMelon, and GoTrendier. Collectively, our startups have raised over $1.5B in funding, generated $3B+ in shareholder value, and created 5,000+ jobs.



Antai is looking for a CEO for a new ecommerce holding company, based in Mexico City.




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Build a consumer brands portfolio from scratch, based on data points generated by AB tasting methodologies using AI tools.

 - Develop high quality business strategies and plans together with the Board of Directors, ensuring their alignment with short-term and long-term objectives

 - Build, lead and motivate a strong team

 - Define and execute the marketing and product strategy to achieve the business plan of the company

 - Oversee all operations and business activities to ensure they produce the desired results and are consistent with the overall strategy and mission

 - Build trust relations with key partners and stakeholders and act as a point of contact for important shareholders

 - Analyze problematic situations and occurrences and provide solutions to ensure company survival and growth.

 - Maintain a deep knowledge of the markets and industry of the company.
   
   


🔍 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Solid experience (+8 years) in CPG firms, marketplaces or digital B2C companies.

 - Strong consumer marketing and product knowledge

 - 360 approach to brand building and strategy

 - Strong analytics & operational skills with the ability to track and analyze marketing campaigns, operational improvements and other initiatives to show a demonstrable ROI

 - An entrepreneurial mindset with outstanding organizational and leadership skills

 - Excellent communication and public speaking skills

 - Passion for consumer businesses and entrepreneurial mindset

 - Last but not least: a sense of humor, a positive “can-do” attitude, and fun to work with
   
   


🤝 WHAT WE OFFER

 - The chance to co-found a company with Antai Ventures, one of Europe and Latin America’s leading venture studios, with a proven model for turning bold ideas into successful businesses.

 - A founder-first structure — Founders keep majority ownership and control of the company, with Antai as a Founding Partner and Board Member.

 - Initial funding and hands-on support from Antai’s in-house operator team across Product, Tech, Design, Growth, Legal, Talent, Fundraising, and Finance — so you can focus on building, testing, and scaling.

 - Access to Antai’s ecosystem of serial entrepreneurs, mentors, and top-tier investors.

 - The opportunity to earn equity in Antai’s wider portfolio as part of our founder network.
   


📩 READY TO BUILD?


If you’re a product and tech-driven entrepreneur ready to build the next big thing in eCommerce, let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer - Stealth Company - Founding Engineer - Vertical AI
source_jobs.description:
Antai Ventures is a Barcelona-based venture studio with presence across Southern Europe and Latam. Since 2012 we have co-founded 35+ companies including Glovo, Wallapop, Piper, PlatanoMelon, and Vitaance.

Our ventures have raised more than $1.5B in funding, have generated more than $3B in shareholder value, and currently employ more than 3,000 people.

At Antai, we partner up and invest in the best co-founders to build global companies willing to disrupt multi-billion dollar industries. In the last 12 years, we have gained experience in a variety of business models (E-Commerces/DNVBs, B2B SaaS, Marketplaces) operating in a wide range of industries including Edutech, Grocery, Healthtech, Fintech, Insurtech, Proptech, Autotech, among others.

We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join the founding team of one of our portfolio companies — a B2B SaaS platform that helps service companies manage the complex, day-to-day operations of their distributed frontline workforce. Think scheduling, real-time coordination, coverage resolution, time tracking, and client communication — all powered by an AI agent that can make phone calls, contact workers, and take autonomous action to keep operations running smoothly.

The vision is ambitious: build the operating system for an entire industry — starting with day-to-day operations, then expanding into deeper integrations across finance, HR, and everything else these companies need to run their business. AI isn't a feature we're bolting on — it's embedded from day one as a core capability that fundamentally changes how these companies operate.



THE ROLE

You’ll be one of the first engineers on a small, high-ownership team building a product from the ground up. This isn’t a role where you’ll be handed tickets — you’ll be researching customer problems, crafting detailed specs, designing solutions, writing code, and shipping features end-to-end. You’ll work directly with the founders and be expected to bring strong judgment about what to build, how to build it, and when to keep things simple.

We need someone who is genuinely full-stack: comfortable across backend, database, frontend, mobile (web-based via Capacitor), and cloud infrastructure. You don’t need to be an expert in every layer, but you need the confidence and curiosity to work through problems across the entire stack, learn what’s needed, and find the right solution for the context.

📍 Location: Barcelona, hybrid (some office days)

📝 Employment: Full-time

🎤 Languages: Proficient English required. Spanish not required, but a basic level is a plus.

💰 Compensation: €50–70K + equity



WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

 - Study customer problems deeply and translate insights into detailed functional and technical specs — then turn those specs into working software.

 - Design and build core backend systems powering workforce scheduling, real-time coordination, and operational workflows.

 - Build clean, well-structured APIs and data models that support web, mobile, and internal tools.

 - Develop the worker-facing mobile experience (web-based, via Capacitor) with a focus on simplicity for low-tech-savviness users.

 - Contribute to the AI agent’s backend — the infrastructure that lets it resolve coverage incidents, contact workers, and take autonomous actions.

 - Manage and evolve cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and developer tooling.

 - Improve reliability, observability, and performance across the system.

 - Build integrations with other business software the industry already uses — accounting, payroll, and other operational tools.

 - Participate in design reviews and product decisions, bringing engineering perspective to what gets built and how.



YOUR FIRST 3–6 MONTHS

You’ll ramp up fast. Here’s what that might look like:

 - Immerse yourself in the domain — studying how service companies actually run their operations day-to-day, reviewing processed customer insights, and building a mental model of the problems we’re

source_jobs.title: CPO & Co-Founder - Proptech
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT ANTAI VENTURES

Antai Ventures is a Barcelona-based venture studio with presence across Southern Europe and LatAm. We partner-up and invest in the best co-founders to build global companies willing to disrupt multi-billion dollar industries. Since 2012 we have co-founded +30 companies including Glovo, Wallapop, PlatanoMelon, and Piper. Our ventures have raised more than $1.5B in funding, have generated more than $3B in shareholders value and currently employ more than 3000 people.




💡ABOUT THE VENTURE

We are building an AI-native platform for the real estate sector in Spain — one of the most fragmented, relationship-driven, and underdigitised industries in Southern Europe.

We have a validated product thesis, a clear go-to-market, and we're now looking for a co-founder that will act as Chief Product Officer.




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build, launch and scale a disruptive product from scratch.

 - Own the product vision, leading the strategy, proposition, and roadmap.

 - Talk to customers relentlessly — turn qualitative insights into product decisions.

 - Define and prioritise what gets built, in what order, and why.

 - Drive a culture of excellence through continuous delivery, rapid experimentation, and customer-obsessed iteration.




🔍 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Proven track record as a product leader in an early-stage environment — whether as PM, Head of Product, or founder.

 - Hands-on builder. You prototype fast and turn ideas into working features in days, not weeks.

 - Practical AI experience. You have built production systems with LLMs — agent orchestration, multi-agent workflows, conversational AI — and know what actually works outside a demo.

 - Product instinct. You've talked to customers, made hard prioritisation calls, and know how to build the right thing, not just build things right.

 - Ownership mindset. You take responsibility for outcomes and think long-term about product and company value.

 - Clear communicator. You can explain technical trade-offs to engineers and non-technical co-founders alike.

 - Fluency in Spanish and English.




🤝 WHAT WE OFFER

 - Day-1 founding seat. Join an ambitious venture from the ground up, with a validated concept and Antai's full backing.

 - Significant equity. Own a meaningful stake in the venture, plus optional carry in other Antai portfolio companies.

 - Full-stack operator support. Access Antai's expert teams in Product, Engineering, Design, GTM, Legal, Talent, and Fundraising whenever you need them.

 - Founder community and investors. Join a tight network of serial entrepreneurs and top-tier backers who have scaled category leaders.

 - Based in Barcelona, hybrid.

source_jobs.title: CTO & Co-Founder - Proptech
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT ANTAI VENTURES

Antai Ventures is a Barcelona-based venture studio with presence across Southern Europe and LatAm. We partner-up and invest in the best co-founders to build global companies willing to disrupt multi-billion dollar industries. Since 2012 we have co-founded +30 companies including Glovo, Wallapop, PlatanoMelon, and Piper. Our ventures have raised more than $1.5B in funding, have generated more than $3B in shareholders value and currently employ more than 3000 people.




💡ABOUT THE VENTURE

We are building an AI-native platform for the real estate sector in Spain — one of the most fragmented, relationship-driven, and underdigitised industries in Southern Europe.

We have a validated product thesis, a clear go-to-market, and we're now looking for a co-founder & CTO to build it.




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build, launch and scale a disruptive product from scratch.

 - Own the technical architecture — define the stack, set the engineering standards, and make the hard trade-offs between speed and scalability from day one.

 - Design and implement a multi-agent orchestration layer — persistent state management, agent-to-agent handoffs, tool-calling pipelines, and context windows that don't collapse under real usage.

 - Build and maintain LLM-powered workflows in production.

 - Integrate third-party infrastructure (voice providers, CRMs, payment and signing APIs, document verification) into a coherent, maintainable system.

 - Ship code daily — from prototype to production, you are hands-on throughout.

 - Drive a culture of excellence through continuous delivery, rapid experimentation, and customer-obsessed iteration.




🔍 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Proven track record as a hands-on engineer, tech lead, or CTO in an early-stage environment.

 - Hands-on builder. You prototype fast and turn ideas into working features in days, not weeks.

 - Practical AI experience. You have built production systems with LLMs — agent orchestration, multi-agent workflows, conversational AI — and know what actually works outside a demo.

 - Architectural thinking. You design systems that are simple enough to ship fast today and solid enough to scale tomorrow.

 - Ownership mindset. You take responsibility for outcomes and think long-term about product and company value.

 - Clear communicator. You can explain technical trade-offs to engineers and non-technical co-founders alike.

 - Fluency in Spanish and English.




🤝 WHAT WE OFFER

 - Day-1 founding seat. Join an ambitious venture from the ground up, with a validated concept and Antai's full backing.

 - Significant equity. Own a meaningful stake in the venture, plus optional carry in other Antai portfolio companies.

 - Full-stack operator support. Access Antai's expert teams in Product, Engineering, Design, GTM, Legal, Talent, and Fundraising whenever you need them.

 - Founder community and investors. Join a tight network of serial entrepreneurs and top-tier backers who have scaled category leaders.

 - Based in Barcelona, hybrid.

notes: Venture studio with multiple startup projects, high tech role ratio but not exclusively tech-focused
